project.name: Domino_Official_Automatic_Model_Documentation_Extension
project.description: Contains the app for the Automatic Model Documentation Extension.

customEnvironment.name: Automatic Model Documentation Extension Compute Environment

app.appDescription: Automatic Model Documentation drafts structured documentation for machine learning models using model code, training artifacts, and governance records.

extension.name: Automatic Model Documentation
extension.description: Draft structured model documentation from code, MLflow artifacts, and Domino Governance bundles. Generate Word documents and optional Jupyter notebooks with citations to source code and governance records.
